title: Thommanum Makkalum
subTitle: A thief and his family decide to mend their ways and start afresh. Things take an awry turn when they find themselves embroiled in local issues.

title: Surrender
subTitle: Across five days, prior to the election season, political conflicts lead to complications for a notorious gangster and the police.

title: USA Weekly News
subTitle: The host presents the latest social and economic news stories about the Malayali diaspora in the USA, along with updates on various cultural events and interviews.

title: Odela 2
subTitle: When a rapist is improperly buried, his ghost begins haunting his village and attacking innocent women. As chaos arises, the villagers look for an answer.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: Aadikeshava
subTitle: Following the death of his biological father, a man travels to Rayalaseema to protect his sister and his ancestral temple.

title: Kochi Rajavu
subTitle: Unni and Ashwathy's life takes a turn after he accidentally kills her cousin in a tussle. After spending time in prison, he moves to Chennai with his family, hoping to start a fresh chapter, but his past catches up with him.

title: Viswasam
subTitle: Thooku Durai, a strong and respected village leader, faces personal struggles as he tries to reunite with his estranged wife Niranjana and daughter, all while confronting challenges from his past.

title: Jinywei - The Blood Of The Sun
subTitle: Qin Feng's brother discovers the real murderer who is the real mastermind and the culprit behind the wipe out of the Qian's family.

title: Poojai
subTitle: A temple priest gives evidence in court about a murder that he has witnessed. Unfortunately for him, he bears witness against an influential landlord.

title: June
subTitle: June, a teenager, believes that there is nothing remarkable about her. She experiences adolescent crushes, handles heartbreaks and fights insecurities as she grows into a mature and confident woman.

title: Gatta Kusthi
subTitle: Veera has a preconceived set of criteria for what he wants in a bride. However, he ends up unexpectedly marrying a woman who is the complete opposite of his expectations.

title: Arrambam
subTitle: Ashok, a former member of the ATS, along with Arjun, a computer hacker, and his girlfriend Anitha, tries to unveil a scam involving the bulletproof jackets provided to police officers.

title: Remo
subTitle: SK, an aspiring actor, falls in love with Kavya, a doctor. However, she is engaged to another man and SK tries to sabotage their relationship by making her fall for him.

title: Return of Heroes
subTitle: Prodigal son Yan Qing and influential courtesan Li Shishi retire to the countryside after struggling to gain amnesty for the outlaws who had rebelled against the government.

title: Garudan
subTitle: The loyal shadow of two childhood friends, Sokkan, grapples with allegiance and betrayal after a temple's riches comes between all of them.

title: Hitler
subTitle: An orphan with no enthusiasm for life is pulled towards the underworld, but when he is entangled with the mafia, he must choose whether to overcome his problems or not.

title: Pokkiri
subTitle: Thamizh, an undercover officer posing as a hitman, falls for Shruthi, who disapproves of his violent lifestyle. Their growing bond faces risks from his hidden mission.

title: U-Turn
subTitle: Rachana, an intern at a newspaper, investigates accidents occurring on a flyover with the help of a crime reporter. However, the situation changes when she is accused of murder.

title: Thalaivaa
subTitle: Vishwa runs a small business in Sydney, unaware that his father is a gangster in Mumbai. When his father is killed by a rival, Vishwa takes over his crime syndicate with revenge on his mind.

title: Shanghai Knight
subTitle: The Chinese and Japanese Chambers of Commerce clash over the Shanghai docks during the Republic of China period, leading Jin, a Chinese patriot, to forge a treaty with the Japanese to save the docks.

title: Saamy
subTitle: Aarusaamy, a police officer, accepts bribes from Perumal, a gangster, in order to maintain peace in his district. However, circumstances force him to go against Perumal.

title: Maari 2
subTitle: Maariyappan, a gangster, is confronted by Gangadhar Beeja, a rival. While he strives to defeat him, he attempts to cope with his son's questionable behaviour.
